heading: View Custom Roles
body:
Atlas CLI

To list all custom database roles for your project using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas customDbRoles list [options]

```

To return the details for a single custom database role in the project you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas customDbRoles describe <roleName> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas customDbRoles list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-customDbRoles-list) and
[atlas customDbRoles describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-customDbRoles-describe).
